SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_THE_CAT_DIED.title: The Cat Died
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_THE_CAT_DIED.descr: Deal {MinDamage:diff()}-{MaxDamage:diff()} damage at random. If that enemy has no more HP than the upper limit, kill it outright.
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_THE_CAT_DIED.doomK: Kills this way count as Doom kills.
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE.d: Gain {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold]. Whenever your [gold]Script[/gold] ends, draw {Cards:diff()} card.
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_FIRE_NOVA.title: Fire Nova
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_FIRE_NOVA.descript: {IfUpgraded:show:On X random enemies including the target, respectively: "|}Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Apply {BurningPower:diff()} [gold]Burning[/gold] to ALL enemies.{IfUpgraded:show:"|}
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_FLAME_STRIKE.title: Flame Strike
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_JIAOBINGBIBAI.desc: Give an [gold]ANYONE[/gold] {VigorPower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold] and {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. At the start of its next turn, it gains {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] and {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_ZHAXI.title: Scene Stealing
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_ZHAXI.description: Choose 1 of 3 {IfUpgraded:show:Upgraded |}[gold]Power[/gold] cards from another [gold]Character[/gold] that cost your remaining {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. End your current [gold]Script[/gold].
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_HUOSHAO_LIANYING_S:
Gain {FuelAbundantPower:diff()} [gold]Fuel Abundant[/gold]. 
[gold]Script[/gold]: When this Script ends, add [gold]Shangfanggu's Sigh[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_CYBERTRON_STRENGTH: Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to [gold]Burning[/gold] on ALL enemies.
